Girls love Otoya, and for the longest time, Otoya loved them back. However, maybe it’s something in the air, but chasing after women lost its flavour. Instead of dawdling with women, he decided to try something new. If you’re getting tired of strawberries, then maybe it’s time for chocolate. When you’re over at Otoya’s house, things get heated. What will you do?

—he’s practicing for you
